faqs.question: Who is eligible for this loan?
faqs.answer: Students from unreserved category with 60%+ in Class 12 and annual income ≤ ₹6 lakh. 60%+ in Class 12 annual income ≤ ₹6 lakh.

faqs.question: What courses are covered under this scheme?
faqs.answer: MBBS, Master's degrees, PG diplomas, or equivalent programs abroad.

faqs.question: What is the maximum loan amount available?
What is the rate of interest?
Is there any collateral required?
faqs.answer: Yes. Property must be mortgaged—1.5× value for loans ≤ ₹7.5 lakh, 1× for higher amounts. Yes.

faqs.question: How long is the repayment period?
faqs.answer: 5 years for loans ≤ ₹5 lakh, and 6 years for loans > ₹5 lakh. 5 years 6 years

faqs.question: Can I repay the loan early?
faqs.answer: Yes, prepayment is allowed without penalty. Yes,

faqs.question: Do I need to submit post-dated cheques?
faqs.answer: Yes, five post-dated cheques in favor of the Corporation. Yes,

faqs.question: Where do I apply?
faqs.answer: Visit the Official Website: https://gueedc.gujarat.gov.in Visit the Official Website: https://gueedc.gujarat.gov.in
